description: External completeness synthesis from step_16 + step_19

interpretation.note: Step 19 provides full lens-name coverage for the target TDCOSMO set. However, combining external-informed tests with core sign tests is statistically invalid due to underlying data correlation. The recommended reporting track is the single most robust non-parametric test: the exact family-sign-flip test respecting method-family clusters, supported by the independence-primary Wilcoxon and external consistency.
